peas.environment: Online banking systems, mobile payment platforms, e-commerce websites, payment gateways, and financial institutions

observability.justification: The system cannot observe all information related to fraud intentions.

agents.justification: Fraudsters and the detection system interact and influence each other.

determinism.justification: Fraud events involve uncertainty and probabilistic behavior.

episodic_sequential.justification: Past transactions affect future fraud detection decisions.

static_dynamic.justification: Fraud patterns and user behavior change continuously.

discrete_continuous.justification: Transaction attributes such as amount and time vary continuously.
